text: 1.3 Communication Systems – RF Link Budget Microhard pDDL 900 (Primary C2) Parameter Value Frequency 902-928 MHz ISM Modulation FHSS (50 hops/sec) Tx Power 37dBm (5W) – Adjustable Rx Sensitivity -110dBm @ 115.2kbps Link Margin 152dB (theoretical) Antenna Moxon (9dBi) on ground, dipole (2dBi) on drone Range 40km LOS at 115.2kbps Actual throughput calculation: • Raw air rate: 345.6kbps • Overhead (FEC + encryption): 28% • Effective payload: 248.8kbps • Enough for: 10Hz telemetry (2kB) + compressed video keyframes (every 30 frames) Video Downlink – V-Nova Perseus + LimeSDR Mini Parameter Value Compression Perseus (MPEG-H Part 2) – 4:1 ratio at 5ms latency Frequency 2.4-2.4835 GHz (choose clean 20MHz channel) Modulation OFDM (64-QAM) – Adaptive based on SNR Max Bitrate 12 Mbps (1080p60 H.264 equivalent quality) Latency (encode+decode) 12ms on Jetson (GPU accelerated)
